nasb.text: or oppress anyone, or retain a pledge, or commit robbery, but he gives his bread to the hungry and covers the naked with clothing,

esv.text: does not oppress anyone, exacts no pledge, commits no robbery, but gives his bread to the hungry and covers the naked with a garment,

cnv.text: 不欺壓任何人，不索取抵押品，不搶奪人的物件，卻把自己的食物給飢餓的人，把衣服給赤身的人穿著；

ccb.text: 不欺压他人，不扣留抵押品，不抢夺财物，反而给饥饿的人食物吃，给赤身露体的人衣服穿，
